title: Loggy Doors
description: Adds Log-textured doors for all types of logs in 1.21.1 to allow the building of hidden bases and passages.
body:
Have you ever wanted to have a proper hidden door for a base? Well, this mod is a step in the right direction, with log and stripped log doors for all vanilla (1.21.1) logs in the game! These logs will blend right into the walls and tree trunks they are placed on, allowing for simple hidden bases!

## Log Doors
All variants, those being Oak, Spruce, Birch, Jungle, Acacia, Dark Oak, Crimson, Warped, Mangrove, Bamboo, and Cherry, have been included and are crafted with 6 of their respective log in a crafting table to get 3 doors.

![Picture showcasing all door variants added via this mod.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1a72d76ea69e6e5567d8e520b8f89a52a1ca2cf.png)

Using an axe, sneak+interact with the door to strip them. 

## Compatability
This mod is simple enough it should function with all other mods, but please post an issue in my github if there is an incompatability. This mod is for Neoforge 1.21.1 and will most likely only update to 1.21.5 for the Pale Oak, but that would be the only major update of this mod. Otherwise, it is feature complete.
